title: The Misadventures of Bob, the Hapless Space Janitor

start.text: Meet Bob, the most important person on the Intergalactic Cruiser Destiny. Not the captain, nor the chief engineer, but the janitor. Little does he know, his mop is about to become the key to saving the universe.
start.image_prompt: A hapless looking janitor leaning on a mop in a futuristic spaceship corridor, cluttered with alien mess, high detail, 8k resolution, by Jean-Baptiste Monge and Moebius
start.environment: The corridor is a cacophony of blinking lights, whirring gizmos, and the faint aroma of last Tuesday's nebula soup.

meet_the_mop.text: Bob's trusty sidekick isn't a plucky robot or a snarky AI, but his slightly sentient mop, affectionately named 'Moppy'. Moppy has a habit of getting Bob into trouble, usually by trying to 'clean up' delicate machinery.
meet_the_mop.image_prompt: A mop with googly eyes in a high-tech spaceship control room, tangled in wires, high detail, 8k resolution, by Simon Stålenhag

npc.name: Moppy, the Sentient Mop
npc.dialogue: *Moppy wiggles its handle in a way that could be interpreted as 'I was just trying to help!'*

warning_klaxon.text: Suddenly, alarms blare throughout the ship. The captain's voice crackles over the intercom: 'Attention crew! We're under attack by...space pirates? That can't be right.'
warning_klaxon.event: The ship shudders as it's hit by an unknown force.

pirate_encounter.text: Bob and Moppy rush to the bridge, only to find it overrun by the most peculiar space pirates imaginable. Their leader, a tall, slender alien with a penchant for dramatic capes, introduces himself.
pirate_encounter.image_prompt: Flamboyant space pirates on a spaceship bridge, led by a tall alien in a dramatic cape, high detail, 8k resolution, by Wayne Barlowe

npc.name: Captain Fancypants, Dread Pirate of the Cosmos
npc.dialogue: 'Greetings, crew of the Destiny! I am Captain Fancypants, and I'm here for your... dirt?'

dirt_macguffin.text: It turns out these aren't ordinary space pirates, but space pirate janitors, in search of the legendary 'Cosmic Dust', said to have the power to clean anything in the universe.
dirt_macguffin.event: Bob realizes his mop is covered in the very dust the pirates seek.

mop_duel.text: In a twist of fate, Bob finds himself in a mop duel with Captain Fancypants for the fate of the Cosmic Dust.
mop_duel.image_prompt: A dramatic mop duel between a space janitor and a flamboyant space pirate on a spaceship bridge, high detail, 8k resolution, by Moebius

battle.message: En garde! May the best mop win!

negotiation.text: Mid-duel, Bob has an epiphany. Why fight over the dust when they could share it? He proposes a truce and a partnership.

npc.name: Bob
npc.dialogue: 'Wait! What if we work together? There's enough Cosmic Dust for everyone!'

alliance.text: Captain Fancypants is intrigued. A partnership between space janitors and space pirate janitors? It's so crazy, it just might work.
alliance.image_prompt: A space janitor and a space pirate shaking hands in agreement, with their mops crossed, high detail, 8k resolution, by Jean-Baptiste Monge
alliance.event: The Intergalactic Janitors' Union is born.

conclusion.text: And so, Bob and Moppy's misadventure leads to the creation of the most efficient (and stylish) cleaning force in the cosmos. The universe has never been so tidy.
conclusion.image_prompt: Bob and Moppy standing proudly with Captain Fancypants and his crew, all holding mops, with a gleaming spaceship in the background, high detail, 8k resolution, by Chris Foss
